      "keystrokes": "python3 -c "
import struct
with open('orig','rb') as f:
    # Read all data section floats
    # .rodata floats at 0x312C onwards
    f.seek(0x312C)
    for i in range(30):
        b = f.read(4)
        v = struct.unpack('<f', b)[0]
        print(f'rodata[{0x312C+i*4:#x}] = {v}')
    # .data doubles at 0x4028
    f.seek(0x4028)
    for i in range(20):
        b = f.read(8)
        v = struct.unpack('<d', b)[0]
        print(f'data[{0x4028+i*8:#x}] = {v}')
"
